data.body:
COMPLETION EVIDENCE (verifier read a stale checkout — the change is on epic branch commit c9879215a, Gerrit change 553, Verified+1 in CI). The five anti-pattern tests were DELETED and replaced with behavioral ones on this branch:
- tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/apply/test_applier_exceptions.py: the 3 hasattr importability tests are gone; replaced by test_direction_guard_raises_direction_mismatch_error (pytest.raises DirectionMismatchError via _direction_guard), test_apply_typed_raises_unknown_action_error_for_unregistered_pair (pytest.raises UnknownActionError via _apply_typed), and test_status_mapping_error_propagates_message_when_raised (StatusMappingError has NO live production raise site — grep confirms no 'raise StatusMappingError' in src/ — so it is exercised at its raise/catch contract; this is the one unprovable path, reported honestly).
- test_applier_reschedule.py: test_exit_reschedule_constant_is_distinct (==75) is gone; replaced by a test driving run_pass and asserting the RETURNED exit code IS applier.EXIT_RESCHEDULE.
- test_fs_tools_extraction.py: the 7-symbol hasattr sweep is gone; replaced by an identity-reuse test (pai_tools._safe_path is fs_tools._safe_path) plus noise-filter effect.
- test_overlap_retrieve.py: test_field_weights_constant (exact _FIELD_WEIGHTS values) is gone; replaced by test_field_weights_drive_ranking asserting a high-weight field outranks a low-weight one.
- test_code_review_artifact.py: the source-grep is gone; replaced by running outbound_differ.compute_outbound_mutations over a store, asserting a code_review ticket yields zero outbound mutations while a task emits a create.
Each was teeth-verified (break prod -> RED -> restore). Combined: 45 tests pass; make lint + typecheck green. Current-branch grep for the old test names / '== 75' / getsource returns zero.
